llm_response:
# Vacation Approval Notice

Dear Team Member, I am writing to formally acknowledge your recent request for time off to recharge and enjoy some well-deserved rest. We have reviewed your application carefully and noted the specific dates you have selected for your upcoming break. We value your contributions to the team, and ensuring you have the opportunity to step away from your duties is a priority for our leadership.

I am pleased to confirm that your vacation days have been fully approved for the requested period. You may now proceed with your plans without any concern regarding your leave status or coverage arrangements. No worries, you're all set for your vacay! To ensure a smooth transition, please remember the following steps before you depart:

*   Submit your final timesheet by the end of this week.
*   Update your out-of-office email auto-responder with your return date.
*   Hand over any pending tasks to your designated colleague.

Please ensure you complete all necessary handover procedures before your departure date. You can find the detailed policy regarding leave requests at [HR Leave Policy](https://example.com/hr-leave-policy). We look forward to seeing you return refreshed and ready to tackle new challenges together. Have a wonderful time away!
